name_en: Top-tier factory set with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier factory set with full packaging
DIOR Lady Sheepskin Bing, dynamic and dazzling, the bold sci-fi visual impact is stunning 🤤. The entire bag has a pearlescent laser effect, like a rainbow, very stunning! Paired with silver metal for more tension, so eye-catching 👍. The contrast between elegance and cool is unique to it. You must take it out for walks once you get it 😌. It is truly too beautiful!! ✔️
Size;20×16.5×8cm
